description: You are a technical diving instructor preparing an Advanced Trimix training course at the Blue Hole, Dahab, Egypt (GPS: 28.5720 N, 34.5412 E). Configure the decompression model with gradient factors GF Low 30% and GF High 70%, and SAC rates of 20 L/min (bottom) and 15 L/min (deco). Plan three training dives using the Dive Planner: Dive 1 (Recreational Baseline) at 30m depth, 30 min bottom time, EAN32 (32% O2), 12L/200bar cylinder. Dive 2 (Introduction to Decompression) at 40m depth, 25 min bottom time, bottom gas EAN32 and deco gas EAN50 (50% O2), both 12L/200bar. Dive 3 (Deep Trimix) at 50m depth, 20 min bottom time, bottom gas Trimix 21/35, deco gases EAN50 and pure Oxygen, all 12L/200bar. Organize all three planned dives into a trip named 'Advanced Trimix Course - Dahab 2024' at location 'Blue Hole, Dahab, Egypt' with the GPS coordinates above. Set buddy 'Ahmed Hassan' on all three planned dives. Export the training plans as PDF to ~/Documents/tech_training_plan.pdf. Save the logbook.
